cases.description: Existence probe: group a,b,a,b over 1,2,3,4 with SUM. In Excel 365 this spills grouped rows (a=4, b=6) plus a grand-total row by default; the exact spill layout depends on optional field_headers/total_depth arguments, so we only assert the engine recognizes the function (not #NAME?)
cases.expected_note: Probe only: layout of the spilled result (headers/totals) varies with optional args; the key datum is whether the engine has GROUPBY at all
